## Status

This template is reserved for Phase 8.

Phase 1 creates the intake surface only. The automated release parity checks
and daily drift issue workflow do not exist yet, so this template should stay
dormant until that later workflow ships.

## When to use this

Use this template only after the Phase 8 release parity workflow is live and a
maintainer explicitly asks for parity-drift reports here.

## If you found a release problem before Phase 8

Open a normal bug report instead and mention that the release parity workflow
is still pending.
